tools.name: word整理
tools.description: 清洗Word文档修订痕迹、字体混乱、Markdown符号、emoji
tools.shell_script:
#!/bin/bash
export PATH="$HOME/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH"

LOG_FILE="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs/docx_format_cleaner.log"
mkdir -p "$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs"
echo "===== word整理开始 $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

SCRIPT="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/tools/docx_format_cleaner/docx_format_cleaner.py"
if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then
    echo "错误：找不到脚本 $SCRIPT" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    /usr/bin/osascript -e 'display notification "找不到word整理脚本，请重新安装" with title "word整理错误"'
    exit 1
fi

# 动态探测 python3
if [ -f "/opt/homebrew/bin/python3" ]; then
    PYTHON="/opt/homebrew/bin/python3"
elif [ -f "/usr/local/bin/python3" ]; then
    PYTHON="/usr/local/bin/python3"
else
    PYTHON="/usr/bin/python3"
fi

for f in "$@"
do
    echo "处理: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    if [[ "$f" == *.docx ]] || [[ "$f" == *.doc ]] || \
       [[ "$f" == *.DOCX ]] || [[ "$f" == *.DOC ]]; then
        "$PYTHON" "$SCRIPT" "$f" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
        STATUS=$?
        BASENAME=$(basename "$f")
        if [ $STATUS -eq 0 ]; then
            /usr/bin/osascript -e "display notification \"整理完成: ${BASENAME}\" with title \"word整理\""
        else
            /usr/bin/osascript -e "display notification \"处理失败: ${BASENAME}\" with title \"word整理错误\""
        fi
    else
        echo "跳过不支持的文件: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    fi
done

echo "===== word整理结束 $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

tools.name: Excel格式整理
tools.description: 统一Excel文件格式、列宽、字体等
tools.shell_script:
#!/bin/bash

LOG_FILE="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs/excel_format_$(date +%Y%m%d).log"
mkdir -p "$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs"
echo "===== Excel格式整理开始 $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

PYTHON="/opt/homebrew/bin/python3"
if [ ! -f "$PYTHON" ]; then
    PYTHON="/usr/local/bin/python3"
fi
if [ ! -f "$PYTHON" ]; then
    PYTHON="/usr/bin/python3"
fi

SCRIPT="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/tools/excel_format/excel_format.py"

if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then
    echo "错误：找不到脚本 $SCRIPT" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    /usr/bin/osascript -e 'display notification "找不到Excel格式整理脚本" with title "错误"'
    exit 1
fi

for f in "$@"
do
    echo "处理文件: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    
    if [[ "$f" == *.xlsx ]] || [[ "$f" == *.xls ]] || [[ "$f" == *.XLSX ]] || [[ "$f" == *.XLS ]]; then
        "$PYTHON" "$SCRIPT" "$f" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
        if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
            echo "处理成功: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
        else
            echo "处理失败: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
        fi
    else
        echo "跳过非Excel文件: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    fi
done

echo "===== Excel格式整理结束 $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

tools.name: word转PDF
tools.description: 将Word文档转换为PDF格式（使用LibreOffice）
tools.shell_script:
for f in "$@"
do
    if [[ "$f" == *.docx ]] || [[ "$f" == *.DOCX ]] || [[ "$f" == *.doc ]] || [[ "$f" == *.DOC ]]; then
        /Applications/LibreOffice.app/Contents/MacOS/soffice --headless --convert-to pdf --outdir "$(dirname "$f")" "$f"
    fi
done

tools.name: MD转Word
tools.shell_script:
#!/bin/bash
# MD转Word工具

export PATH="$HOME/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"

# 日志文件
LOG_FILE="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs/md2word.log"
mkdir -p "$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs"
echo "===== MD转Word开始 $(date) =====" > "$LOG_FILE"

# 查找脚本
SCRIPT="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/tools/md2docx_plain/md2docx_plain.py"
if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then
    echo "错误：找不到脚本 $SCRIPT" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    /usr/bin/osascript -e 'display notification "找不到MD转Word脚本，请重新安装" with title "MD转Word错误"'
    exit 1
fi

# 获取Python
if [ -f "/opt/homebrew/bin/python3" ]; then
    PYTHON="/opt/homebrew/bin/python3"
elif [ -f "/usr/local/bin/python3" ]; then
    PYTHON="/usr/local/bin/python3"
else
    PYTHON="/usr/bin/python3"
fi

# 处理每个选中的文件
for f in "$@"
do
    echo "处理: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    if [[ "$f" == *.md ]] || [[ "$f" == *.MD ]] || [[ "$f" == *.markdown ]] || [[ "$f" == *.txt ]] || [[ "$f" == *.TXT ]]; then
        "$PYTHON" "$SCRIPT" "$f" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
    else
        echo "跳过不支持的文件: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    fi
done

echo "===== MD转Word结束 $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

tools.name: 生成信息图
tools.description: 将Word或Markdown文档内容生成信息图（HTML+PDF）
tools.shell_script:
#!/bin/bash

LOG_FILE="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs/infographic_generator.log"
mkdir -p "$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs"
echo "=== 开始处理 $(date) ===" > "$LOG_FILE"

# 动态探测 pandoc
if command -v pandoc >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    PANDOC="pandoc"
elif [ -f "/opt/homebrew/bin/pandoc" ]; then
    PANDOC="/opt/homebrew/bin/pandoc"
elif [ -f "/usr/local/bin/pandoc" ]; then
    PANDOC="/usr/local/bin/pandoc"
else
    PANDOC="pandoc"
fi

# 加载配置文件
CONFIG_FILE="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/config/infographic.json"
CONFIG_DIR="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/config"

# 确保配置目录存在
mkdir -p "$CONFIG_DIR"

# 初始化配置文件（如果不存在）
if [ ! -f "$CONFIG_FILE" ]; then
    echo '{"deepseek_api_key":"","qwen_api_key":""}' > "$CONFIG_FILE"
    echo "创建配置文件: $CONFIG_FILE" >> "$LOG_FILE"
fi

# 读取配置
deepseek_key=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('$CONFIG_FILE')).get('deepseek_api_key',''))" 2>/dev/null)
qwen_key=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('$CONFIG_FILE')).get('qwen_api_key',''))" 2>/dev/null)

# 自动选择模型：优先 DeepSeek，其次千问
if [ -n "$deepseek_key" ]; then
    model_choice="DeepSeek"
    ai_suffix="ds"
    api_key="$deepseek_key"
    api_url="https://api.deepseek.com/v1/chat/completions"
    model_name="deepseek-chat"
elif [ -n "$qwen_key" ]; then
    model_choice="千问3.5-plus"
    ai_suffix="qwen"
    api_key="$qwen_key"
    api_url="https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1/chat/completions"
    model_name="qwen-plus"
else
    echo "API Key 未配置，跳过处理" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    echo "请通过 WorkBuddy / Claude 配置 API Key 后重试" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    exit 0
fi

echo "自动选择模型: $model_choice" >> "$LOG_FILE"

for f in "$@"
do
    echo "处理文件: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    
    # 检查文件类型
    if [[ "$f" != *.docx ]] && [[ "$f" != *.DOCX ]] && [[ "$f" != *.doc ]] && [[ "$f" != *.DOC ]] && [[ "$f" != *.md ]] && [[ "$f" != *.MD ]]; then
        echo "跳过不支持的文件格式: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
        continue
    fi
    
    # 提取目录和文件名
    dir=$(dirname "$f")
    base_name=$(basename "$f")
    base_name="${base_name%.docx}"
    base_name="${base_name%.DOCX}"
    base_name="${base_name%.doc}"
    base_name="${base_name%.DOC}"
    base_name="${base_name%.md}"
    base_name="${base_name%.MD}"
    
    # 构建带 AI 来源标识的输出文件路径
    html_file="$dir/${base_name}_${ai_suffix}.html"
    pdf_file="$dir/${base_name}_${ai_suffix}.pdf"
    
    echo "输出文件: $html_file, $pdf_file" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    
    # 显示进度通知
    osascript -e "display notification \"正在使用 $model_choice 生成信息图，请稍候...\" with title \"生成信息图\""
    
    # 转换文档为 Markdown
    if [[ "$f" == *.docx ]] || [[ "$f" == *.DOCX ]] || [[ "$f" == *.doc ]] || [[ "$f" == *.DOC ]]; then
        md_content=$("$PANDOC" "$f" -f docx -t markdown 2>/dev/null)
        if [ -z "$md_content" ]; then
            md_content=$(cat "$f")
        fi
    else
        md_content=$(cat "$f")
    fi
    
    # 保存到临时文件
    temp_md=$(mktemp)
    echo "$md_content" > "$temp_md"
    
    echo "使用模型: $model_name" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    
    # 调用 Python 脚本处理
    python3 "$HOME/.rightclick-creator/tools/infographic/generate_infographic.py" "$temp_md" "$html_file" "$api_key" "$api_url" "$model_name" "$ai_suffix" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
    python_exit_code=$?
    
    echo "Python exit code: $python_exit_code" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    
    # 检查 HTML 是否生成成功
    if [ -f "$html_file" ] && [ -s "$html_file" ] && [ $python_exit_code -eq 0 ]; then
        echo "HTML 生成成功" >> "$LOG_FILE"
        
        # 使用 Chrome 打印为 PDF（带背景）
        echo "正在打印 PDF（带背景）..." >> "$LOG_FILE"
        
        # 方法1：使用 Chrome headless 打印（推荐）
        if command -v /Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            /Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome                 --headless                 --disable-gpu                 --print-to-pdf-no-header                 --run-all-compositor-stages-before-draw                 --print-to-pdf="$pdf_file"                 "file://$html_file"                 2>> "$LOG_FILE"
        elif command -v /Applications/Chromium.app/Contents/MacOS/Chromium >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            /Applications/Chromium.app/Contents/MacOS/Chromium                 --headless                 --disable-gpu                 --print-to-pdf-no-header                 --run-all-compositor-stages-before-draw                 --print-to-pdf="$pdf_file"                 "file://$html_file"                 2>> "$LOG_FILE"
        else
            # 方法2：使用 WeasyPrint（备选）
            echo "Chrome 未找到，使用 WeasyPrint..." >> "$LOG_FILE"
            python3 -m weasyprint "$html_file" "$pdf_file" 2>> "$LOG_FILE"
        fi
        
        if [ -f "$pdf_file" ] && [ -s "$pdf_file" ]; then
            echo "PDF 生成成功" >> "$LOG_FILE"
            osascript -e "display notification \"信息图已生成！[$ai_suffix]\" with title \"生成信息图\""
            open "$html_file"
            open "$pdf_file"
        else
            echo "PDF 生成失败" >> "$LOG_FILE"
            osascript -e "display notification \"PDF生成失败，但HTML已生成[$ai_suffix]\" with title \"生成信息图\""
            open "$html_file"
        fi
    else
        echo "HTML 生成失败" >> "$LOG_FILE"
        osascript -e "display notification \"生成失败，请查看日志\" with title \"生成信息图\""
    fi
    
    # 清理临时文件
    rm -f "$temp_md"
done

echo "=== 处理完成 $(date) ===" >> "$LOG_FILE"

tools.name: PDF转MD
tools.description: 将PDF文件智能转换为Markdown格式
tools.shell_script:
#!/bin/bash
# PDF转MD工具 - 智能转换

export PATH="$HOME/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"

# 日志文件
LOG_FILE="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs/pdf2md.log"
mkdir -p "$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs"
echo "===== PDF转MD开始 $(date) =====" > "$LOG_FILE"

# 查找脚本
SCRIPT="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/tools/pdf2md/pdf2md_converter.py"
if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then
    echo "错误：找不到脚本 $SCRIPT" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    /usr/bin/osascript -e 'display notification "找不到PDF转MD脚本，请重新安装" with title "PDF转MD错误"'
    exit 1
fi

# 获取Python
if [ -f "/opt/homebrew/bin/python3" ]; then
    PYTHON="/opt/homebrew/bin/python3"
elif [ -f "/usr/local/bin/python3" ]; then
    PYTHON="/usr/local/bin/python3"
else
    PYTHON="/usr/bin/python3"
fi

# 处理每个选中的文件
for f in "$@"
do
    echo "处理: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    if [[ "$f" == *.pdf ]] || [[ "$f" == *.PDF ]]; then
        "$PYTHON" "$SCRIPT" "$f" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
    else
        echo "跳过非PDF文件: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    fi
done

echo "===== PDF转MD结束 $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

tools.name: MD整理
tools.shell_script:
#!/bin/bash
# MD整理工具 - 调用Python脚本处理Markdown文件

# 获取Python路径
if [ -f "/opt/homebrew/bin/python3" ]; then
    PYTHON="/opt/homebrew/bin/python3"
elif [ -f "/usr/local/bin/python3" ]; then
    PYTHON="/usr/local/bin/python3"
else
    PYTHON="/usr/bin/python3"
fi

# 日志文件
LOG_FILE="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs/md_cleaner.log"
mkdir -p "$HOME/.rightclick-creator/logs"
echo "===== MD整理开始 $(date) =====" > "$LOG_FILE"

# 查找脚本
SCRIPT="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/tools/md_cleaner/md_cleaner.py"
if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then
    echo "错误：找不到脚本 $SCRIPT" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    /usr/bin/osascript -e 'display notification "找不到MD整理脚本，请重新安装" with title "MD整理错误"'
    exit 1
fi

# 处理每个选中的文件
for f in "$@"
do
    echo "处理文件: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    if [[ "$f" == *.md ]] || [[ "$f" == *.markdown ]] || [[ "$f" == *.MD ]] || [[ "$f" == *.MARKDOWN ]]; then
        "$PYTHON" "$SCRIPT" "$f" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
        echo "处理完成: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    else
        echo "跳过非Markdown文件: $f" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    fi
done

echo "===== MD整理结束 $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

# 显示完成通知
/usr/bin/osascript -e 'display notification "MD整理完成" with title "MD整理"'

tools.name: 查询天眼查
tools.description: 选中企业名称，右键直接跳转天眼查搜索页面
tools.shell_script:
#!/bin/bash
company_name="$1"

# 动态探测 node
if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    NODE="node"
elif [ -f "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v20.20.0/bin/node" ]; then
    NODE="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v20.20.0/bin/node"
elif [ -f "/opt/homebrew/bin/node" ]; then
    NODE="/opt/homebrew/bin/node"
elif [ -f "/usr/local/bin/node" ]; then
    NODE="/usr/local/bin/node"
else
    NODE="node"
fi

SCRIPT_DIR="$HOME/.rightclick-creator/tools/tianyancha"
if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/controller.js" ]; then
    /usr/bin/osascript -e 'display notification "天眼查脚本未找到，请重新安装" with title "天眼查错误"'
    exit 1
fi

"$NODE" "$SCRIPT_DIR/controller.js" "$company_name"
